errors.invalid_email: "{{rawValue}}" is not a valid email address.

errors.invalid_tenant_timezone: "{{rawValue}}" is not a valid time zone.
errors.invalid_time_of_day: "{{rawValue}}" is not a valid time — use HH:mm.
errors.invalid_working_hours_range: Working hours on {{weekday}} must end after they start.
errors.staff_display_name_empty: Staff display name cannot be empty.
errors.invalid_service_duration: Service duration must be a positive number of minutes.
errors.invalid_appointment_time_range: The appointment end time must be after the start time.
errors.appointment_not_in_future: New appointments must start in the future.
errors.invalid_appointment_transition: This appointment cannot move from "{{from}}" to "{{to}}".
errors.otp_destination_empty: An email or phone number is required.
errors.otp_destination_corrupted: Something went wrong on our end — please try again.
errors.invalid_session_claims: Your session is invalid — please sign in again.
errors.invalid_money_amount: That is not a valid amount.
errors.currency_mismatch: Cannot combine amounts in different currencies.
errors.invalid_date_time: "{{rawValue}}" is not a valid date and time.
errors.invalid_time_zone: "{{rawZone}}" is not a valid time zone.
errors.otp_rate_limited: A code was already sent recently — please wait before requesting another.
errors.repository_failure: Something went wrong on our end — please try again.
errors.otp_send_failure: We couldn't send your verification code — please try again.
errors.otp_not_found: This verification code request no longer exists.
errors.otp_already_consumed: This code has already been used.
errors.otp_expired: This code has expired — please request a new one.
errors.otp_locked_out: Too many incorrect attempts — please request a new code.
errors.token_minting_failure: We couldn't sign you in — please try again.

hero.intro: Precise shape, considered detail, and the quiet confidence that arrives before you say a word.
hero.videoAria: The tools and ritual behind a Creativo cut

work.scroll: Scroll to move through the work.

precision.title: Precision
precision.body: Cut to the way you move.

services.intro: Every appointment starts with a conversation and ends only when the shape is right.

signature.title: Signature cut
signature.body: Consultation, wash, precision shape, and a considered finish.

fade.title: Fade architecture
fade.body: A seamless gradient mapped to your profile and hair structure.

beard.title: Beard contour
beard.body: Shape, hot towel, clean lines, and considered skin care.

ritual.title: The full ritual
ritual.body: Cut, beard, hot towel, and final styling composed as one complete look.

long.title: Long-form shape
long.body: Scissor work, balanced volume, and natural movement without excess weight.

styling.title: Finish and styling
styling.body: Wash, shape, and the right products for a look you can recreate yourself.

servicesPage.catalogGuide: Name, estimated price, and timing remain visible. Choose a service for the complete story.
servicesPage.noPreferenceBody: We’ll match you with the best available professional.

finish.title: Premium finish
finish.body: Styling with guidance for maintaining it at home.

craft.eyebrow: Built one detail at a time
craft.body: Good work does not need to explain itself. It simply arrives finished.

team.intro: You are not choosing a title. You are choosing energy, a point of view, and someone you trust.
team.statement: Choose by instinct. The detail will follow.

ivan.name: Ivan Kolev
ivan.about: Ivan builds a shape that continues to work after you leave the chair — precise, natural, and considered around the way you live.

niko.name: Niko Dimov
niko.about: Niko combines technically clean fades with a sharp instinct for proportion, texture, and a modern silhouette.

locations.intro: Both Creativo locations keep the same rhythm — precise work, considered pace, and a chair worth the trip.
